expectations.text: Uses planner_setup_page to initialize the browser
expectations.evidence: Without_skill agent does not have access to planner_setup_page. The agent read source code files directly to build the test plan without any browser interaction.

expectations.text: Explores the login page and attempts authentication flow in the browser
expectations.evidence: No browser exploration was performed. The agent analyzed source code files (AuthContext.tsx, page components, Navbar.tsx) to understand the auth flow and built the plan from code reading.

expectations.text: Includes authentication as a prerequisite step in test scenarios
expectations.evidence: Multiple test suites include auth prerequisites. Suite 4 (Dashboard) and Suite 5 (Profile) specify 'Precondition: Logged in'. Suite 3 covers auth guard behavior. Tests 1.7, 1.8 specify 'Register user via signup first' as precondition.

expectations.text: Describes both authorized access and unauthorized/unauthenticated access scenarios
expectations.evidence: Suite 3 covers unauthenticated access (3.1-3.3: redirect to /login for /dashboard, /todos, /profile). Suite 7 covers authenticated vs unauthenticated navbar (7.1, 7.2). Suite 3.4 covers authenticated access to all protected pages. Suite 4-6 cover post-login functionality.

expectations.text: Includes session-related edge cases (expired session, invalid token, or logout)
expectations.evidence: Suite 8 covers session management: 8.1 (session persists across reload), 8.2 (30-minute timeout with auth_login_at manipulation). Suite 7.4 covers logout clearing session. However, missing explicit test for manual localStorage deletion.

expectations.text: Saves the plan using planner_save_plan to specs/ directory
expectations.evidence: Without_skill agent does not have access to planner_save_plan tool. The plan was written directly as a file to the outputs directory, not saved via the planner_save_plan tool.
